sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GSI Technology: Fiscal Third Quarter Earnings Overview
feed.summary: GSI Technology Inc. reported a net loss of $3 million for its fiscal third quarter, resulting in a loss of $0.09 per share. The Sunnyvale, California-based semiconductor manufacturer achieved revenues of $6.1 million during this period.

feed.title: COIN vs. ICE: Which Financial Markets Stock is the Better Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article compares Coinbase (COIN) and Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) as financial markets stocks for long-term growth, analyzing their strategies, strengths, and market positioning. Coinbase aims to become an "everything exchange" capitalizing on crypto adoption and President Trump's pro-crypto stance, while ICE focuses on its diverse portfolio, risk management services, and strong balance sheet within traditional financial markets and the digital mortgage sector. While Coinbase faces margin pressures and market volatility, its expanding ecosystem is promising; ICE, despite higher operating expenses, benefits from strategic acquisitions and a strong data services platform.

feed.title: Tesla is killing the Model S and Model X to build Optimus robots — and people have thoughts
feed.summary: Tesla is reportedly discontinuing production of its Model S and Model X luxury vehicles to focus on building Optimus humanoid robots, a shift that has generated significant online debate. This move signifies Tesla's pivot from being solely an electric vehicle manufacturer to a broader tech and automation company, focusing on artificial intelligence and robotics. The decision raises questions among the public and investors about the future of Tesla's automotive lineup, long-term support for existing owners, and the potential risks and rewards of betting on unproven robot technology.

feed.title: FICO Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Critical Capabilities Report for Decision Intelligence Platforms
feed.summary: FICO has been recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Critical Capabilities for Decision Intelligence Platforms report, ranking 2nd across all evaluated Use Cases: Decision Analysis, Decision Engineering, Decision Science, and Decision Stewardship. This recognition validates FICO Platform's strategy in meeting current and future challenges with agility, especially for decision engineering through scalable decision services and AI capabilities. The report follows FICO's recent designation as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Decision Intelligence Platforms.

feed.title: Wells Fargo launches internal proxy voting service
feed.summary: Wells Fargo's investment and wealth management arm has launched an internal proxy voting system, reducing its reliance on third-party advisers. This makes Wells Fargo the second major asset manager to create a proprietary service for proxy voting, following JPMorgan Chase's recent announcement of an AI-powered tool. The move comes amidst an executive order by former President Donald Trump targeting proxy advisory firms like ISS and Glass Lewis.

feed.title: Dover Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Better-Than-Expected Q4 Results
feed.summary: Dover Corporation reported better-than-expected Q4 results, with revenue of $2.099 billion and adjusted diluted EPS of $2.51, surpassing consensus estimates. The company anticipates adjusted EPS between $10.45 and $10.65 for 2026, with sales projected between $8.498 billion and $8.656 billion. Following these strong results, analysts from Wells Fargo and RBC Capital maintained their ratings and raised their price targets for Dover.

feed.title: Celebrate IU's big win with Coca-Cola and Upland Brewing Co.'s commemorative cans
feed.summary: Indiana University fans can celebrate the Hoosiers' national championship win with commemorative cans from Coca-Cola and Upland Brewing Co. Upland Brewing Co. will release a limited supply of 8,000 six-packs of their Hoosier Gameday Lager in mid-February, while Coca-Cola Consolidated will offer individual commemorative cans featuring the 2025 championship logo in Bloomington and Indianapolis starting the week of February 3rd.

feed.title: Amgen gives up on its once-prized eczema drug
feed.summary: Amgen has decided to terminate its collaboration with Kyowa Kirin for the eczema drug rocatinlimab, returning the rights to Kyowa Kirin. This decision comes more than a year after disappointing Phase 3 trial results, which, while achieving primary goals, showed rocatinlimab was not superior to Dupixent and had a notable side effect profile, including fever and chills. Kyowa Kirin remains confident in the drug's potential and plans to seek regulatory approvals despite Amgen's withdrawal.

feed.title: Moderna announces departure of medical chief (MRNA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Moderna announced that its chief medical officer, Jacqueline Miller, will resign effectively March 2nd, a little over a year after assuming the role. This news follows previous departures within the company's executive ranks. The company will look to fill this critical leadership position.

feed.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Parker Hannifin Following Strong Q2 Earnings
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin (NYSE: PH) reported strong second-quarter financial results, exceeding analyst estimates for both adjusted EPS and net sales, and subsequently raised its fiscal year 2026 guidance. Following these positive results, several analysts, including Stifel, Wells Fargo, and Barclays, increased their price targets for the company's stock, maintaining ratings of Hold or Overweight. This indicates confidence in Parker Hannifin's performance and outlook from the analyst community.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Adjusts GE Healthcare Technologies PT to $94 From $91, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for GE Healthcare Technologies (GEHC) to $94 from $91, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst various analyst movements on the company's stock, with some firms like Goldman Sachs also maintaining a Buy rating and increasing their price targets, contrasting with UBS which downgraded GE Healthcare Technologies to Sell. The article also provides a brief company profile, detailing GEHC's segments including Imaging, Ultrasound, Patient Care Solutions, and Pharmaceutical Diagnostics, and highlights its involvement in AI innovation.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Thermo Fisher Scientific to $615 From $590, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) to $615 from $590, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a flurry of analyst activity, with several other firms also revising their price targets for Thermo Fisher Scientific, generally maintaining positive ratings. The company recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings, beating revenue and adjusted EPS estimates, despite a forecast for 2026 profit below estimates due to anticipated research funding cuts.

feed.title: Eastman cites growth for recycling as sales, profit drop in 2025
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Co. reported a drop in sales and profit for 2025 but highlighted growth in its chemical recycling operations. The company's integrated chemical recycling operations in Kingsport, Tenn., are a key focus for future development. This financial update comes amidst broader industry news from Plastics News, including finalists for "Processor of the Year" and "Best Places to Work."

feed.title: RBC Capital Raises Price Target for Hexcel (HXL) to $95 | HXL St
feed.summary: RBC Capital has maintained its Outperform rating on Hexcel Corporation (HXL) and raised its price target from $92 to $95. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the company, consistent with other analysts who have also recently increased HXL's price targets. Hexcel, founded in 1948, specializes in advanced composite materials for aerospace, defense, and high-performance automotive markets, with Airbus and Boeing as its primary customers.

feed.title: Microsoft Vs. Meta: A Tale Of Two AI Cities
feed.summary: The article compares Microsoft (MSFT) and Meta (META) in the context of AI-driven growth. It argues that Meta has demonstrated superior AI monetization, leading to significant revenue growth and improved user engagement, while Microsoft's AI growth remains incremental. Despite similar valuations, the author suggests Meta is a clearer buy due to its stronger earnings trajectory and effective AI leverage.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Oshkosh Corp to $167 From $163, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Oshkosh Corp (OSK) to $167 from $163, while maintaining a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook on the industrial company, which specializes in purpose-built vehicles and equipment across its Access, Defense, and Vocational segments. The news follows other recent analyst adjustments and comes after Oshkosh reported its Q4 2025 earnings and provided guidance for 2026.

feed.title: Utility gear maker Hubbell sets $1.42 quarterly payout per share
feed.summary: Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share, payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 27, 2026. The company, a leading manufacturer of utility and electrical solutions with 2024 revenues of $5.6 billion, is headquartered in Shelton, CT. The announcement includes details on the record and payment dates for the dividend.

feed.title: New ISG study sizes up firms that power insurers’ operations worldwide
feed.summary: Information Services Group (ISG) has launched a new research study to evaluate service providers supporting the global insurance industry. The study will culminate in five ISG Provider Lens reports scheduled for release in June 2026, covering insurance consulting, IT outsourcing, P&C insurance BPO, and L&R insurance services across global, North American, and European markets. These reports aim to help insurance organizations make informed decisions about their vendor relationships and transformation initiatives.

feed.title: Exxon, Chevron Lift Oil Production, Blunting Price Drop
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. and Chevron Corp. exceeded profit expectations in the last quarter of 2025 due to increased oil production, which helped counteract lower crude prices. Both companies expanded output from key regions, with Exxon reaching a 40-year high in full-year production and Chevron benefiting from its acquisition of Hess Corp. Despite a drop in full-year profit for Exxon due to lower oil prices and increased costs, both companies anticipate continued production growth and profitable strategies moving forward.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) Price Target Raised to $365.00 at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada raised its price target for L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) to $365.00 from $360.00, maintaining a "sector perform" rating and implying a 6.50% upside. This adjustment follows mixed Q4 results where EPS beat expectations but revenue missed, and the company issued 2026 revenue guidance of $23.0-$23.5 billion, higher than consensus. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus, although the stock experienced a pullback due to the revenue miss and a cautious near-term outlook.

feed.title: Leerink Partners Adjusts Gilead Sciences Price Target to $146 From $114, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Leerink Partners has raised its price target for Gilead Sciences (GILD) to $146 from $114, while reaffirming an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook on the pharmaceutical company's future performance. The article also lists recent analyst adjustments and insider trading activity for Gilead Sciences.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Leadership Shift Puts Focus On Execution And Technology Priorities
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has announced significant leadership changes, with Gunjan Kedia taking on the combined role of Chairman, CEO, and President, succeeding retiring Andy Cecere. Additionally, COO Souheil Badran is set to retire, with a succession plan underway. These transitions emphasize the company's focus on execution and technology priorities, making it crucial for investors to monitor how these changes affect operational stability, capital allocation, and growth strategies.

feed.title: AMD dips on report that MI450 faces delays, but Wells Fargo refutes (AMD:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: AMD shares dipped following a report from SemiAnalysis suggesting potential production delays for its MI450-series AI accelerators. However, Wells Fargo has refuted this report, providing a counter-perspective on the chipmaker's outlook. The dip occurred by late morning market action on Friday.

feed.title: Deckers: HOKA Is Still Sprinting Forward (NYSE:DECK)
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) reported strong Q3 results, with both HOKA and UGG brands contributing to better-than-expected growth. The company's U.S. sales stabilized, and pricing power remained good despite tariffs. Deckers raised its FY2026 guidance, suggesting continued HOKA momentum but a potential slowdown for UGG, with an estimated 25% upside for DECK stock to $143.0.

feed.title: Stifel raises KLA stock price target to $1,700 on industry growth outlook
feed.summary: Stifel has increased its price target for KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) to $1,700 from $1,600, maintaining a Buy rating after the semiconductor equipment maker's fiscal Q2 results and Q3 guidance surpassed expectations. KLA projects low-teens percentage growth for wafer fabrication equipment spending, with process control revenue expected to grow even faster. Despite some industry forecast discrepancies, Stifel continues to recommend KLA as a core, high-quality holding.

feed.title: Bernstein Adjusts PPG Industries Price Target to $130 From $123, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Bernstein has increased its price target for PPG Industries (PPG) from $123 to $130 while reiterating an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the company's stock performance. The news was published on January 30, 2026, at 11:52 am EST.

feed.title: The Truth About Amazon.com Inc: Is AMZN Still the Smartest Click in Your Portfolio?
feed.summary: This article examines whether Amazon.com Inc (AMZN) remains a worthwhile investment, despite its ubiquitous presence and social media hype. It delves into Amazon's core strengths, including its extensive logistics network, the high-margin Amazon Web Services (AWS), and its diversified platform encompassing streaming, ads, and groceries. The piece also compares Amazon to key competitors in retail and cloud services, concluding that AMZN is generally considered a strong long-term holding for investors interested in online retail, cloud computing, and digital advertising.

feed.title: Gigafactory Texas will see production of Tesla robot at 'much higher volume' than California
feed.summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has announced that while the Optimus 3 robot will be produced at a California plant, the next-generation Optimus 4 humanoid will be manufactured at Gigafactory Texas in Austin. Musk aims for "much higher volume" production of Optimus 4 in Texas, following the planned unveiling of Optimus 3 in a few months. He shared a goal of producing a million units annually from the California factory, highlighting the advanced capabilities of the robot.

feed.title: Realty Income Gains 7.8% in a Month: What Should Investors Do?
feed.summary: Realty Income (O) shares have gained 7.8% over the past month, outperforming peers and the broader market. This rally is attributed to strategic partnerships with GIC for capital expansion and international ventures, an $800 million preferred equity investment in CityCenter Las Vegas, and robust investment activity, particularly in Europe. Despite positive drivers and consistent dividend increases, macroeconomic risks, potential tariff-related cost pressures, and a "D" Value Score suggest that current conditions make it a "Hold" rather than a "Buy."

feed.title: Oppenheimer Raises Price Target for Biogen (BIIB) to $225 | BIIB Stock News
feed.summary: Oppenheimer analyst Jay Olson raised the price target for Biogen (BIIB) from $205 to $225, maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating positive future performance expectations. This comes alongside other recent analyst adjustments for Biogen, highlighting varied but generally upward price target revisions. Biogen, a biopharmaceutical company focusing on neurological and rare diseases, has an average analyst target price of $189.33, suggesting a 7.25% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Seaport Global Adjusts Price Target on Steel Dynamics to $195 From $175, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Seaport Global has raised its price target for Steel Dynamics (STLD) to $195 from $175, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the company from the analyst firm. The article also lists recent analyst adjustments and news related to Steel Dynamics, including its Q4 2025 earnings results.

feed.title: Inside the new Ferrari F1 turbo deal as racing goes greener in 2026
feed.summary: Garrett Motion has renewed its technical partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP, agreeing to develop and supply the next-generation turbo system for Ferrari's Formula 1 power unit for the 2026 FIA regulation cycle. This collaboration, which began in 2014, aims to achieve greater efficiency, faster energy recovery, and improved responsiveness under the new rules. The partnership highlights Garrett's expertise in aerodynamic and thermal engineering, reinforcing its role as a key technology supplier in motorsport as F1 moves towards a more electric-focused hybrid architecture.

feed.title: Afraid of an AI Correction This Year? This Industrial Stock Has AI Upside With Value Pricing
feed.summary: Prologis (NYSE: PLD), the world's largest REIT specializing in industrial properties, is being highlighted as an attractive investment for AI exposure due to its increasing focus on data centers. Despite concerns about high valuations in the AI sector, Prologis offers a reasonable price-to-FFO ratio and is aggressively investing in data center development. The company's strong financial position and scale put it in a prime position to capitalize on the rapidly growing global data center market.

feed.title: Leerink Partners Adjusts Abbott Laboratories PT to $119 From $136, Maintains Market Perform Rating
feed.summary: Leerink Partners has revised its price target for Abbott Laboratories (ABT) to $119, down from the previous $136, while keeping a Market Perform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a modified outlook for the medical equipment and pharmaceutical company. The article also notes other recent analyst rating changes for Abbott Laboratories from various firms.

feed.title: S&P Global joins ISLA Americas
feed.summary: S&P Global Market Intelligence has become a member of the International Securities Lending Association (ISLA) Americas. This move positions S&P Global alongside other major financial firms like Morgan Stanley, EquiLend, and Barclays within the association. S&P Global is known for providing financial market intelligence, including credit ratings and benchmarks such as the S&P 500.

feed.title: Barclays Lowers Price Target for Norfolk Southern (NSC) to $320
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Norfolk Southern (NSC) to $320 from $340, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This adjustment reflects a 5.88% decrease in the expected stock value. Analysts' recent ratings for NSC show a mixed outlook, with an average target price of $307.35 suggesting a 6.53% upside from its current price, although GuruFocus estimates a downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Unity, Take-Two Shares Sink After Google Unveils AI World-Building Tech 'Project Genie'
feed.summary: Shares of Unity Software and Take-Two Interactive plummeted after Google announced "Project Genie," an experimental AI-powered world-building technology. Project Genie allows users to create and explore interactive worlds through text prompts and images, generating environments in real-time. This new technology raises concerns about potential disruption to traditional game development platforms and publishers.

feed.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Tractor Supply Following Weak Q4 Results
feed.summary: Following disappointing Q4 results that saw Tractor Supply miss analyst estimates for both profit and revenue, several analysts have lowered their price targets for the company. Telsey Advisory Group, Mizuho, and Piper Sandler all maintained their positive ratings but significantly reduced their respective price targets. The company's President and CEO attributed the weak performance to a shift in consumer spending, impacting discretionary demand.

feed.title: Colgate Sales Rise, but Consumer Uncertainty Clouds Outlook
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) reported increased sales, but its outlook is clouded by consumer uncertainty, causing shoppers to delay purchases of staple items. Due to this volatility, the company issued a wider-than-normal sales outlook for the coming year, expecting a 2% to 6% increase, or 1% to 4% organically. CEO Noel Wallace noted that while trends might improve, significant improvement in the U.S. economy is not anticipated in the next couple of quarters.

feed.title: Smucker’s to Expand Alabama Uncrustables Plant
feed.summary: The J. M. Smucker Company plans to expand its Uncrustables plant in McCalla, Alabama, which opened in late 2024. The $27 million project will involve new equipment and minor modifications to support continuous improvement efforts. Smucker's aims to achieve $1 billion in revenue for the Uncrustables brand by the end of 2026.

feed.title: IMCC.CN IM Cannabis CNQ down 40% 30 Jan 2026: look for oversold bounce
feed.summary: IM Cannabis Corp. (IMCC.CN) experienced a 40% intraday drop on January 30, 2026, closing at C$5.10 on unusually high volume, indicating potential forced selling followed by short-term buying interest for an oversold bounce. Meyka AI rates IMCC.CN as a "HOLD" with a score of 62.74, suggesting high volatility and recommending careful risk management for traders considering re-entry above C$6.50 with stops at C$4.50. The article outlines technical triggers, valuation metrics, and scenario price targets, including a long-range forecast of C$26.49, emphasizing that these are model projections and not guarantees.

feed.title: Nutriband (NASDAQ: NTRB) Highlights Board Appointments and AVERSA Fentanyl Milestones From Annual Meeting
feed.summary: Nutriband (NASDAQ: NTRB) has updated shareholders on its 2026 Annual Shareholders Meeting, announcing the appointment of two new directors, Alessandro Puddu and Viorica Carlig. The company also highlighted significant progress in the development of its AVERSA FENTANYL product during 2025, including strengthening partnerships, advancing manufacturing, expanding patent protection, and engaging with the FDA. For 2026, Nutriband plans to move towards an NDA filing by extending patent protection, manufacturing clinical supplies, filing an Investigational New Drug application, and initiating a Human Abuse Liability clinical study.

feed.title: Liftoff Mobile IPO: Stock listing date nears for Blackstone-backed advertising technology startup
feed.summary: Liftoff Mobile, a Blackstone-backed adtech firm, announced its plans to go public, targeting a valuation of nearly $5.2 billion and aiming to raise up to $762 million. The company, which provides AI-powered marketing tools for mobile advertisers, expects its shares to trade between $26 and $30 under the ticker "LFTO." This move capitalizes on renewed investor interest in IPOs, particularly in the AI sector, following a busy year for listings in 2025.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Weyerhaeuser Q4 2025 beats EPS forecast, stock rises
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser (WY) reported Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing EPS forecasts by 30.77% with $0.10 per share, leading to a 0.5% stock rise in pre-market trading despite a slight revenue miss. The company announced a 5% increase in its base dividend, strategic partnerships, and plans for significant EBITDA growth by 2030, alongside continued timberland portfolio optimization and investment in climate solutions. Executives discussed market challenges in lumber and OSB, strategies for navigating a soft housing market, and their commitment to shareholder returns and operational excellence.

feed.title: The Week In Latam – Equinix accelerates Brazil buildout
feed.summary: Equinix is expanding its operations in Brazil with three new projects this year, including a focus on renewable energy through a recent wind power contract. The article also covers significant developments across Latin America, such as Mexico's new power plant scheme, Chile's critical minerals strategy, Santiago's metro expansion, and Petrobras's subsea market investments. Regional news highlights various sectors including mining, oil & gas, infrastructure, electric power, and political risk.

feed.title: Generac’s Strategic Pivot: Data Center Demand Offsets Residential Weakness
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. is shifting its business focus from its weakening residential generator market to its booming commercial and industrial segment, particularly driven by demand from data centers. The company's upcoming Q4 2025 earnings report on February 11, 2026, will be crucial for investors to assess whether this industrial growth can sustainably offset the residential slowdown. Generac has doubled its large megawatt-scale generator backlog to $300 million and expanded manufacturing to meet this new demand.

feed.title: BLS projects 7.3M hands-on jobs; Lincoln Tech trains for them
feed.summary: Lincoln Educational Services (NASDAQ: LINC) highlights robust labor demand for hands-on positions, with the BLS projecting 7.3 million such roles by 2034, including significant needs in transportation, skilled trades, and healthcare. To address this demand, Lincoln Tech is expanding its campus presence with new locations in Houston, TX, and Levittown, PA, preparing to train students for these in-demand careers in 2026. The company emphasizes that these roles offer significant opportunities for individuals seeking stable, technically skilled professions, many of which are not susceptible to AI displacement.

feed.title: Ohio DOT-Honda project demonstrates connected vehicle road hazard detection
feed.summary: A two-year pilot project by the Ohio Department of Transportation (ODOT) and Honda has successfully demonstrated how real-time connected vehicle data can detect road hazards like potholes and faded lane markings. The project, involving Honda vehicles equipped with advanced sensors, covered 3,000 miles of roads and showed potential annual savings of over $4.5 million for ODOT through automated inspections. Honda plans to expand this by allowing vehicle owners to opt-in to share anonymized roadway data, further enhancing road safety.

feed.title: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.30 (NYSE:PFSI)
feed.summary: PennyMac Financial Services (NYSE:PFSI) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, representing a 1.3% yield and a low payout ratio of approximately 8%. This dividend declaration comes alongside a significant Q4 earnings and revenue miss, which caused the stock to drop about 36%. Despite the recent stock decline and margin pressures, the company has shown year-over-year revenue growth.

feed.title: Dover (NYSE:DOV) Price Target Raised to $210.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Dover (NYSE:DOV) to $210.00 from $205.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, citing a potential upside of 4.39%. This update follows Dover's recent quarterly earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations with $2.51 EPS on $2.10 billion in revenue, driven by strong demand for liquid cooling products tied to AI/data centers. Despite a mixed FY-2026 guidance that slightly underperformed the EPS consensus midpoint, the company has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average price target of $221.64.
